versions.version_description: Reworked tab, this is meant to be as a easy way to play a cover on a single acoustic guitar...

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This is my first tab so it's probably not perfect. This is how I play it and it sounds 
pretty good.
[tab]For the [ch]Bm[/ch] I pick the adgbgda strings in that order and the adgb strings in that order 
for the G and A.[/tab]
I hope you enjoy this.

Intro
[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] x4

Verse 1
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
I took a walk around the world to[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
Ease my troubled mind[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
I left my body laying somewhere[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
In the sands of time[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
I watched the world float to the dark side of the moon[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
I feel there is nothing I can do, yeah[/tab]

[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] x2

Verse 2
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
I watched the world float to the[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Dark side of the moon[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
After all I knew it had to be something[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]
To do with you[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
I really don't mind what happens now and then[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
As long as you'll be my friend at the end[/tab]


Chorus (Use power chords)
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
If I go crazy then will you still[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
Call me Superman[/tab]

[tab][ch]B[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
If I'm alive and well, will you be[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
There a-holding my hand[/tab]

[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I'll keep you by my side with[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
My superhuman might[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]
Kryptonite[/tab]


Interlude
[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]


Verse 3
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
You called me strong, you called me weak[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
But your secrets I will keep[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
You took for granted all the times I[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]
Never let you down[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
You stumbled in and bumped your head, if[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
Not for me then you'd be dead[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
I picked you up and put you back[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
On solid ground[/tab]


Chorus
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
If I go crazy then will you still[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
Call me Superman[/tab]

[tab][ch]B[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
If I'm alive and well, will you be[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
There a-holding my hand[/tab]

[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I'll keep you by my side with[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
My superhuman might[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]
Kryptonite[/tab]


Solo (Power chords)
[ch]B[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] x4
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch] (Play on the fourth time instead of [ch]G[/ch] and [ch]A[/ch])

Chorus
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
If I go crazy then will you still[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
Call me Superman[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
If I'm alive and well, will you be[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
There a-holding my hand[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
I'll keep you by my side with[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
My superhuman might[/tab]


Kryptonite


Chorus
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
If I go crazy then will you still[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
Call me Superman[/tab]

[tab][ch]B[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
If I'm alive and well, will you be[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
There a-holding my hand[/tab]

[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I'll keep you by my side with[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
My superhuman might[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]
Kryptonite[/tab]

Outro solo
[ch]B[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] x4
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch] (Play on the fourth time instead of [ch]G[/ch] and [ch]A[/ch])
